title: Report templates and release gates
purpose: Make report generation more useful in CI and handoff workflows by adding templates, coverage thresholds, and concise validation output.
actions: Add report template option for summary, full, and CI JSON modes
Expose validation summary in CLI text output

criteria: Existing JSON and Markdown reports remain valid
CI mode returns non-zero on configured gate failures
Tests cover missing evidence and skipped job warnings

summary: Added report templates, CI gate summary, min lab coverage gate, and export tests.
